title: How was the angels born in the rebuilds reboot movies considering adam is not in them
display_title: How was the angels born in the rebuilds reboot movies considering adam is not in them
wikitext:
[]: How was the angels born in the rebuilds / reboot movies considering adam is not in them?             Quote Post by Bob74h » Thu May 22, 2025 10:30 pm In the og eva tv series adam was the device Kaji brought to gedo ikari and caused the second impact in the rebuilds the impact was caused by a group of entity's called adams and the device Kaji brought to gendo, was nebuchadnezzar's key. systematically almost, the angel adam was removed from the rebuilds for no reason so my question simply would be how does the existence of angels work without adam?

[]: Re: How was the angels born in the rebuilds / reboot movies considering adam is not in them?             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Sun May 25, 2025 1:23 pm In my opinion, Rebuild lore is not that refined or consistent compared to the original. Many things relevant to the plot are just never explained. Such as, what exactly Adams are? How did they, spears and Golgotha object ended up in the Minus-sapce? What is minus space? How does memory manipulation work? What are EVAs in this universe? How did thousands of EVAs produced without being manufactured by army of humans? How looping works? What is book of life? What's the deal with Kaworu? What's with Seele being just computers, or whatever? Why, after 14 years spent in EVA 01 Shinji's hair is short, while Rei's is long? What's with Mari and how even old is she? What's with clone programming? What's with all the spears? Same thing with Angels. If we don't really know anything about Adams, then there's no way we can even get close to understand what Angels are. And no wonder, the Angels VS Humanity subplot was completely removed from story, just like any focus on Lilith VS Adam. It's not really there. They crammed like 10 times more characters, EVAs, Lore into the final movie, and they had less time to establish all of it compared to NGE + EOE. There is no way they would be able to explain it all, and tie all loose ends. So, Angel question not even in the top ten of questions I have for the Rebuilds.

[]: Re: How was the angels born in the rebuilds / reboot movies considering adam is not in them?             Quote Post by penguintruth » Sat May 31, 2025 2:14 pm Weird_ocean wrote: What's with all the spears?
